title: Troubleshooting biGBac: a practical guide
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9q4us","text":"The biGBac system presented by Weissmann et al. (Weissmann et al, 2016 and Weissmann et al, 2018) is a modular insect cell expression system designed for expression of multi-subunit complexes. The system is very powerful, allowing up to 25 genes to be assembled into one baculo-virus expression vector, but does require a reasonable amount of cloning experience in order to attain clones in the 6 day time frame stated in the paper. This guide was written to provide a detailed explanation how the system is designed, how it can be further exploited and provide in-depth practical information that even a novice cloner can follow.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":41,"length":7},{"style":"italic","offset":59,"length":7},{"style":"italic","offset":85,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Erin Cutts
